ksa_text: Knowledge of containerization and container orchestration concepts for data workloads, including Docker container principles, image layering and optimization, Kubernetes pod and service architecture, and resource management for data-intensive containers.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Technical Foundations KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.36) to justify inclusion for the Director of Analytics. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Director of Analytics roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Technical Foundations is not a standard competency expectation for Director of Analytics. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of Analytics competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.36) and edge-domain placement (Technical Foundations) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of Analytics. All passes support exclusion.
